scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('index.html')) { if (!fs.existsSync('www')) { fs.mkdirSync('www'); } fs.copyFileSync('index.html', 'www/index.html'); console.log('Successfully copied index.html to www/'); } else { console.log('index.html already in www/ directory, skipping.'); }"
